mapper.update: UPDATE t_pet SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{petId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_pet SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE id = #{petId} AND deleted = 0 AND like_count > 0
UPDATE t_pet SET favorite_count = favorite_count + 1 WHERE id = #{petId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_pet SET favorite_count = favorite_count - 1 WHERE id = #{petId} AND deleted = 0 AND favorite_count > 0
UPDATE t_pet SET application_count = application_count + 1 WHERE id = #{petId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM t_pet WHERE deleted = 0 AND category IS NOT NULL ORDER BY category
SELECT DISTINCT adoption_status FROM t_pet WHERE deleted = 0 AND adoption_status IS NOT NULL ORDER BY adoption_status
